case_title: Pulmonary embolism missed after clear chest X-ray
initial_situation: Man had breathlessness, fast heart/respiratory rate, low oxygen.

what_was_missed_or_identified: Pulmonary embolism likely missed; PE blood test not done.
outcome_if_known: Patient died; PHSO found likely survival with right treatment.
lesson_or_pattern: Discordant tests should not close diagnosis.
product_or_system_implication: Flag pneumonia diagnosis + clear X-ray + PE signs mismatch.
